positive: A majestic, stylized silhouette of a soaring celestial fox spirit (Huli Jing), rendered in clean vector lines and strong negative space. The fox is depicted mid-leap against a deep midnight blue and violet gradient background, surrounded by abstract constellations of geometric stars and luminous, stylized moon phases. The composition should be centered, achieving high contrast and a clean, scalable aesthetic perfect for screen printing on apparel. Use bioluminescent accents in teal and gold leaf textures. Art style: Neo-traditional graphic design, stylized illustrative art, deep space fantasy.
negative: blur, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, text, watermark, logo, signature, noise, smudges, photorealistic, dirty, cluttered, complex background, gradient banding
